# Hanzo Flow Documentation

> Official documentation for Hanzo Flow, a low-code platform for building and deploying AI-powered agents and workflows with a visual builder, API, and MCP server. Technical documentation for developers, data scientists, and teams building RAG and multi-agent applications.

Hanzo Flow is open source (MIT). Run locally with `uv run hanzoflow run` (Python 3.10-3.13, default http://127.0.0.1:7860). Key areas: get started (installation, quickstart, tutorials), flows (build, run via API or webhooks, test, import/export), agents and MCP, develop (config, storage, observability), deploy (Docker, Kubernetes, cloud), components reference, and API reference.

## Docs

- [About Hanzo Flow](https://docs.hanzo.ai/flow/about): Platform overview and introduction
- [Install Hanzo Flow](https://docs.hanzo.ai/flow/get-started-installation): Installation options (OSS, Docker, from source)
- [Quickstart](https://docs.hanzo.ai/flow/get-started-quickstart): Get up and running quickly
- [Use the visual editor](https://docs.hanzo.ai/flow/concepts-overview): Visual flow builder overview
- [Trigger flows with the API](https://docs.hanzo.ai/flow/concepts-publish): Run flows via the Hanzo Flow API
- [Agents](https://docs.hanzo.ai/flow/agents): Agents and tools
- [MCP client and server](https://docs.hanzo.ai/flow/mcp-client): Model Context Protocol integration
- [Deployment overview](https://docs.hanzo.ai/flow/deployment-overview): How to deploy Hanzo Flow
- [Security](https://docs.hanzo.ai/flow/security): Deployment and security guidance
- [Release notes](https://docs.hanzo.ai/flow/release-notes): Version history and release notes

## Community

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/hanzoai/flow): Source code and issues
- [Hanzo AI website](https://hanzo.ai): Main product site
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/hanzo): Community chat

## Optional

- [Build flows](https://docs.hanzo.ai/flow/concepts-flows): Concepts for building flows
- [Test flows](https://docs.hanzo.ai/flow/concepts-playground): Playground and testing
- [Components overview](https://docs.hanzo.ai/flow/concepts-components): Component reference introduction
- [API reference](https://docs.hanzo.ai/flow/api-reference-api-examples): Get started with the Hanzo Flow API
- [Troubleshooting](https://docs.hanzo.ai/flow/troubleshoot): Troubleshooting guide
